name: Gery's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix together the cream cheese and sugar until thoroughly combined.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in salt and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the mixture into a prepared graham cracker crust.
6. Bake for 1 hour in the preheated oven.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
8. For the topping, mix together sour cream, sugar, and vanilla.
9. Spread the sour cream mixture over the top of the cheesecake filling.
10. Return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes or until set.
11. Turn off heat and allow the cheesecake to cool completely before serving.
12. Serve plain or with berries, if desired. Makes one deep-dish pie (or two individual custard cups).
